title: eriosema corymboides
intro: Eriosema corymboides, a plant species belonging to the Fabaceae family, is also known as the 'Kaffir pea' or 'Wild pea'. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Eriosema corymboides is used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems, due to its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve pain. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared into herbal teas or infusions, as well as dried and powdered for use in capsules or tinctures.
